title: Piglin Peace Trims
description: Makes piglins passive when you are wearing golden trims
body:
# Features
- Changed piglin behavior to neutral when seeing players with gold trims.
- Adds the "**Golden Influence**" advancements (Wear a piece of armor with gold material trim for the first time.)

![Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YUOif5bn/images/96127320c7b2d6b90a9543f96c7ced32a6ad31a2.png)

![Neutral Piglin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YUOif5bn/images/033d5a4a2d7f227eb831746fff7f0ece0a53ac5c.png)
